implemented: Input Guardrails (deterministic safety and cost rules)
Authenticated gateway (first-run owner setup + HTTP-only sessions)
Organization roles (owner / admin / member) and account provisioning
Coding sessions with trusted attempts, workflow/context characteristics, and structured user verification
Evidence-qualified Model Fit after a Playground coding session is verified
Cost-to-Success across recorded attempts when a successful session has complete cost evidence
Fit Gap and overpowered/underpowered classification only when comparison evidence qualifies
Outcome Dashboard with Model Fit, Cost-to-Success, evidence coverage, task breakdowns, and recommendations
Privacy / local-only enforcement for sensitive requests
Optional OpenAI adapter when explicitly configured
Provider fallback (at most one fallback after primary)
Offline Ragas evaluation (not in the real-time path)
PyTorch Image Analyser (ResNet18 coarse classification + visual complexity; wired in n8n)
partial_or_planned: Policy Intelligence runtime (Structured Policy Engine + inheritance)
Policy Evidence Retrieval (POST /policy/query is currently a placeholder)
Automated coding verification from tests, builds, lint, and type checks through connectors
Controlled multi-model benchmark expansion and evidence-based product claim gate
Team- and repository-specific learned recommendations after sufficient verified data
unsupported: Automatic policy-document enforcement / current Policy RAG
